title: Meeting consumer product and cosmetic safety requirements - Canada.ca
content:
## Meeting consumer product and cosmetic safety requirements
Information on meeting consumer product and cosmetic safety requirements, compliance, testing, guidelines and polices.

## Services and information

### Consumer product safety requirements for industry
Know the product safety requirements for industry, including mandatory incidence reporting, record keeping, prohibitions and regulations, and upcoming webinars.

### Consumer product safety compliance
Understand the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act.

### Consumer product safety guidelines and policies
Find guidelines and policies on product safety, including product recalls, cosmetic labelling, toy requirements and industry standards.

### Cosmetic product safety requirements
Access cosmetic safety regulations, a list of prohibited and restricted ingredients, labelling information, and recall and safety alerts. Also find new cosmetic notification forms.

### Safety testing for consumer products
Discover what testing is needed to ensure consumer product safety.
